title: Add permanent account deletion feature

requirements.text: Add a `deleteAccount` backend function that permanently removes the authenticated user's profile from the canister state. The function must verify the caller's identity before deletion and return a success/error result.

quotes: add delete key to delete the account permanantly

acceptanceCriteria: A `deleteAccount` public shared function exists in the main actor
The function only deletes the profile belonging to the authenticated caller (by principal)
Calling the function with a valid authenticated identity removes the user profile from stable storage
Calling the function when no profile exists returns an appropriate error variant
After deletion, querying the profile for the same principal returns null/not found

requirements.text: Add a 'Delete Account' button in the user profile/settings area (e.g., within the profile menu in AppHeader or a dedicated Settings section). Clicking it must open a confirmation dialog warning the user that this action is permanent and cannot be undone. On confirmation, call the backend `deleteAccount` function, clear all local storage data for the user, log the user out via Internet Identity, and redirect to the landing page.

quotes: add delete key to delete the account permanantly

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Delete Account' button is visible in the user profile menu or settings area
Clicking the button opens a modal confirmation dialog with a clear warning that deletion is permanent
The dialog has a clearly labeled destructive confirm button (e.g., 'Yes, Delete My Account') and a cancel button
On confirmation, the backend `deleteAccount` function is invoked
All user-related keys in localStorage (profile, complaints metadata, notifications, alerts) are cleared on successful deletion
The user is logged out via the Internet Identity logout flow after deletion
The user is redirected to the landing/login page after successful deletion
If the backend call fails, an error message is shown and the account is not deleted

constraints: Account deletion must only affect the authenticated caller's own data — no admin bulk-delete or deletion of other users' accounts
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Confirmation dialog must use existing Shadcn UI dialog/alert-dialog components
nonGoals: Soft-delete or account suspension — only hard permanent deletion is in scope
Deleting complaints submitted by the user from the backend (only the user profile is removed)
Admin ability to delete other users' accounts
Email or notification sent upon account deletion
